case for the AHC bridge organization B23). 
The first digit is always 3, then the 2nd and 3rd digits are the numeric portion of the bridge organization 
identifier (i.e., the “B” from the bridge organization ID is replaced with a “3”). The remaining 6 digits 
are sequential numbers representing the navigation cases within the bridge organization.
